dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

clusters.label: Funds withheld for days without resolution
Customer support is unresponsive or absent
Forced budget or auto-debit without consent
Ticket restaurant UX is confusing and flawed
Promo or referral bonus miscommunication or denial
Account closure or data deletion is impossible
Registration or verification process is flawed
Positive experience with core payment functionality

insights.title: Support failures leave users feeling powerless and erode confidence in the service.
insights.summary: Users consistently report that customer support is either unresponsive or entirely absent, with many describing interactions limited to automated chatbots that fail to resolve issues. Requests for human assistance are ignored, and promises of callbacks or follow-ups are not honored. The lack of support is particularly damaging when users face urgent issues, such as frozen funds or unauthorized debits. Many express a sense of betrayal, as they feel the service prioritizes growth over addressing user concerns. The problem is widespread and affects users across multiple languages and regions.

evidence.name: MO
evidence.quote: Non rispondono da giorni. Sono giorni che i miei soldi sono trattenuti e non trasferiti sul mio conto. Oltre i 5 giorni per effettuare un bonifico. Non risponde nessun umano…

evidence.name: MA
evidence.quote: Fino a una settimana fa avrei dato almeno 4 stelle tranquillamente, ma qualche giorno fa è successo un evento che mi ha fatto inevitabilmente abbassare la valutazione. Ho invitato…

evidence.name: PS
evidence.quote: awful without any support and help. just an unusual bot. Avoid it. lost 50 euro

insights.recommendation: Introduce a dedicated, human-led support channel for urgent issues and ensure all support requests receive a response within a set timeframe. Publicly commit to resolving critical issues, such as frozen funds, within a defined period.

insights.title: Withheld funds cause financial distress and loss of trust in the service.
insights.summary: A recurring theme is users reporting that their money is withheld for days or even weeks after initiating transfers or top-ups. Many describe missing bill payments, being unable to access their own funds, and facing financial hardship as a result. The lack of transparency about the delay and the absence of a resolution exacerbate frustration. Some users suspect the delays are intentional to keep funds within the platform, while others simply feel abandoned by the service. The issue is not isolated to a single region or language, indicating a systemic problem.

evidence.name: SO
evidence.quote: 4 days and still my money is not transferred, i missed my bill due because of this useless app, even their assistance takes one day to respond!!

evidence.name: MO
evidence.quote: Non rispondono da giorni. Sono giorni che i miei soldi sono trattenuti e non trasferiti sul mio conto. Oltre i 5 giorni per effettuare un bonifico. Non risponde nessun umano…

evidence.name: SA
evidence.quote: 1 settimana per spostare 100 euro dal questo conto al mio conto con iban quando alcune piattaforme lo fanno in meno di 10 secondi .. servizio clienti inesistente…pessimo

insights.recommendation: Implement real-time or near-instant fund transfers and provide clear, proactive communication about any delays, including expected resolution timelines. Offer compensation or goodwill gestures for users affected by prolonged withholding.

insights.title: Ticket restaurant functionality is confusing and forces unintended use of personal funds.
insights.summary: Users relying on Satispay for ticket restaurants describe a frustrating and confusing experience. The app often defaults to deducting payments from personal funds instead of ticket balances, even when the latter is available. The process of selecting ticket restaurants is cumbersome, requiring location services and manual searches, which fail frequently. Many users report being embarrassed at checkout when payments are declined or misapplied. The lack of clarity in the interface and the absence of a straightforward way to prioritize ticket spending over personal funds are recurring pain points.

evidence.name: BA
evidence.quote: Ricevo dei buoni pasto su Satispay purtroppo non potendo completare il pagamento con altri metodi mi trovo sempre in imbarazzo alle casse perché spesso ci si ritrova senza…

evidence.name: GA
evidence.quote: Terrificante, peggior app mai utilizzata per i buoni pasto. Non si capisce nulla, bella solo la grafica, scomoda da morire. Manderò un’e-mail anche interna per cambiare provider

evidence.name: AS
evidence.quote: la parte dei buoni pasto non é per nulla comoda. Per favore introducete la visualizzazione dei luoghi sulla mappa, attualmente devo sprecare tempo, in parallelo, a cercare i…

insights.recommendation: Redesign the ticket restaurant payment flow to prioritize ticket balances by default and simplify the selection of affiliated stores. Add clear visual indicators to show which payment method will be used before checkout.
